title: M&G COMPASS
subtitle: M&G COMPASS
overview: Our M&G Compass is an alloy compass with a mechanical pencil design that is a perfect tool for maths students who need precision and accuracy in their drawings. It is made from high-quality alloys that are durable and long-lasting, ensuring that it can withstand heavy use. The mechanical pencil design means that you can easily switch between drawing and measuring without having to fumble with multiple tools. The compass has an adjustable radius, making it suitable for drawing circles of different sizes. Its non-slip grip ensures that it's comfortable to use, and the lead is refillable, making it a more sustainable option.

title: M&G COMPASS ( MINI )
subtitle: M&G COMPASS ( MINI
overview: If you are looking for a complete and comprehensive set of maths tools, Our M&G Compass mini set is perfect for you. It includes one compass with a mechanical design, making it easy to switch between drawing and measuring without the need for multiple tools. Along with that, there is a 12cm ruler, a protractor, a 45-degree triangular ruler and a 60-degree triangular ruler, making it suitable for all kinds of math drawing and geometry work. With everything you need in one convenient kit, you will be able to tackle any maths problem with ease.

title: M&G RULER SET
subtitle: M&G RULER SET
overview: Our M&G Ruler Set is an ideal tool kit for anyone who needs to make precise measurements and draw angles accurately. It includes a 15cm ruler, which is perfect for measuring small distances with precision. Additionally, there is a 180-degree protractor, which makes it easy to draw angles with accuracy. The set also comes with a 45-degree triangle ruler and a 60-degree triangle ruler, which are useful for drawing triangles and other geometric shapes. All of the tools in this set are made from high-quality materials, making them durable and long-lasting. This ruler set is perfect for students, professionals, and anyone who needs reliable and accurate tools for their work.

title: M&G FLEXIBLE RULER SET
subtitle: M&G FLEXIBLE RULER SET
overview: Our So Many Cats soft and durable flexible ruler sets come with a 45-degree triangle ruler, a 60-degree triangle ruler, a 180-degree protractor and a 15cm ruler.

title: M&GWAVING RULER 15 CM ( 6" ) /18 CM ( 7" )
subtitle: M&GWAVING RULER 15 CM
overview: Set sail with the M&G One Piece Series Character Ruler, available in 15cm and 18cm lengths. title: M&G COMFORT METAL COMPASS ( 801 )
subtitle: M&G COMFORT METAL COMPASS
overview: Introduction: The M&G Professional Metal Geometry Compass (801 Model) is a precision drawing tool designed for students, architects, engineers, and designers. Crafted from high-quality metal, this durable compass is perfect for geometry, drafting, and technical drawing. It can create circles up to Ø350mm, ensuring versatility for school, office, or professional use. The replaceable lead design and compact 135mm length make it a long-lasting and reliable addition to any math set or drafting tools. Packaged in a secure plastic storage box, it’s an ideal companion for learners and professionals alike. Highlights: Draw Circles up to Ø350mm: Ideal for geometry, technical drawing, and drafting.
